explanation.summary: Carbs are carrying this food most, while minerals are the biggest drag. It lands in S tier.
explanation.whyThisTier: This food lands in S tier with an overall score of 57 from a base nutrition score of 54. Context lifted it by 3 points.

topPros.title: excellent fruit-category fit
topPros.explanation: Very strong fibre moderation and low glycemic behaviour make it a clean example of what the fruit category is supposed to reward.

topCons.title: quite perishable
topCons.explanation: Storage life is not amazing compared with sturdier fruits.

topCons.title: can be pricey
topCons.explanation: Cost can limit how practical it is as a staple fruit.

topCons.title: protein contribution is negligible
topCons.explanation: Not a real flaw for fruit, but still basically absent.

narrationNotes: Context improved the final tier case by 3 points.

topPros.title: very practical everyday fruit

topCons.title: sugar load is fairly high
topCons.explanation: Less moderated than the best fruits.

topCons.title: glycemic behaviour is only middling
topCons.explanation: Not harsh, just not one of the cleanest fruits on this axis.

explanation.summary: Fats are carrying this food most, while vitamins are the biggest drag. It lands in C tier.
explanation.whyThisTier: This food lands in C tier with an overall score of 16 from a base nutrition score of 25. Context dragged it down by 9 points.

topPros.title: still brings some useful minerals
topPros.explanation: Not nutritionally empty despite the weak fruit fit.

topPros.title: can be useful in high-energy contexts
topPros.explanation: There are niche cases where the dense sugar load is useful.

topPros.title: still a recognisable whole fruit
topPros.explanation: That matters for fairness even when the category fit is weak.

topCons.title: sugar density is a major category problem
topCons.explanation: Fruit is supposed to moderate sugar with fibre and payoff, and dates push the sugar side extremely hard.

topCons.title: glycemic behaviour is rough for fruit
topCons.explanation: Much weaker fit than fruits with gentler carb behaviour.

topCons.title: dried-fruit concentration makes the sugar hit even harsher
topCons.explanation: This is the cleanest reason dates should remain below ordinary whole fruits like grapes.
